_about: Base team ratings derive from the June 2026 FIFA Men's World Ranking (0-100). Each player carries Football Manager attributes (1-20) grouped into Mental/Physical/Technical; worldcup.fm_rating computes the player's 0-100 rating from them with position-specific weights. 'rating' is kept as a fallback/anchor. Edit attributes or import a real FM export to re-derive strengths automatically.
